abilities.description: Put a +1/+1 counter on each other Squirrel you control. (To forage, exile three cards from your graveyard or sacrifice a Food.)

effect.description: Put a +1/+1 counter on each other Squirrel you control. (To forage, exile three cards from your graveyard or sacrifice a Food.)
effect.name: PutCounterAll

statics.description: Other Squirrels you control have menace.

triggers.description: Whenever you sacrifice one or more Foods, create a 1/1 green Squirrel creature token.
